events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr, born Richard Starkey, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's big day
angles.copy: Peace and love to Ringo Starr today as he celebrates his 86th birthday. Which Beatles track always gets your toes tapping?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Rock legend's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar riff?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Jagger's milestone
angles.copy: Still got the moves at 83! Happy Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your ultimate Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first-ever music video.

angles.name: MTV's birthday
angles.copy: Can you believe it's 45 years since MTV launched? 'Video Killed The Radio Star' was the first video, but what was the first music video you ever saw that blew you away?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' released (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their groundbreaking debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, featuring hits like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. That album defined a generation. What's your standout track from it?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, '3 Days of Peace & Music', took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago today, half a million people descended on a field in New York for Woodstock. Peace, love, and incredible music. Which iconic performance do you wish you'd seen live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977. His music continues to influence generations. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur tragically passed away on September 13, 1996, after being shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: Remembering the legendary Tupac Shakur today. His impact on music and culture remains undeniable. What's your essential Tupac track?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix, widely regarded as one of the greatest guitarists of all time, died on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Tribute to Jimi Hendrix
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, who left us far too soon on this day in 1970. His guitar work still sounds revolutionary. What's your favourite Hendrix moment?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' released (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released on September 26, 1969, in the UK and October 1, 1969, in the US.

angles.name: Abbey Road anniversary
angles.copy: It's 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover alone is legendary, let alone the music! Which track is your go-to?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde's birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon. What's your favourite Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and former Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad for it!
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite Liam moment, musical or otherwise?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic song 'Imagine' on October 11, 1971, in the US, and as part of the album 'Imagine' on September 9, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine's message
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. A timeless message of peace and hope. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, making it available for purchase on November 10, 2001.

angles.name: iPod's 25th birthday
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? It's 25 years since Apple introduced '1,000 songs in your pocket'. How did the iPod change your music listening habits?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the release date of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From Connery to Craig, who is your favourite 007 and what's the ultimate Bond theme song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The iconic Beatles co-founder John Lennon was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message still resonate deeply. What's your favourite Lennon lyric?
